input_context.hiring_signal_brief: Two peer companies posted senior MLOps roles. Prospect has no public MLOps role posting.
input_context.bench_summary: ML/data squads available for scoped engagements; avoid condescending language.
input_context.prior_thread: Cold first touch, no previous exchange.

candidate_output:
Subject: Note: peer MLOps hiring pattern

Hello,

We noticed two peers in your segment posted senior MLOps roles this quarter; that may or may not map to your roadmap.

I am not assuming a gap on your side, but if this is under discussion, we can share how teams scoped the first 90 days without overbuilding too early.

If useful, would a short call next week help?

Best,
Research Partner
Tenacious Consulting and Outsourcing
gettenacious.com

dimensions.name: confidence_calibration
dimensions.description: Asks rather than asserts under weak signal
